properties.displayName: Enforce Valid AA Standard Tag Values on Resources
nonComplianceMessages: This aa-app-shortname or aa-sdlc-environment tag value is not valid. If the aa-app-shortname value is a valid Archer shortname, it may not be onboarded in Azure. Please complete the 'Onboard New App to Azure' form on https://developer.aa.com/create/templates/default/gaas-app-onboard
